title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating eight practical workflows using Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model, including multimodal vision, video analysis, contract analysis, code generation, task prioritization, error debugging, OCR, and Workspace agentic chains. The video argues that Gemini 3.5 Flash performance rivals the Pro tier at lower cost.
